phoneticUs: 藞ma瑟ko蕣藢t蓱藧ks瑟n; 藞ma瑟k蓹藢t蓱藧ks瑟n
examples: Ochratoxin a is a mycotoxin known to be toxic to the kidneys.
Most of the mycotoxin detoxifying products in China are listed as raw materials.
Mycotoxin found in cereals. Binds to the ribosome and inhibits protein synthesis.
But there are no reliable tests to show that a person has been exposed to a specific mold or mycotoxin, much less how long that exposure lasted or how much of a substance he absorbed.
